entry.title: Introducing Higgsfield Apps: Your Way to AI-Powered Apps with No Code
entry.summary: Building a full app used to mean writing code and wiring in AI models yourself. Higgsfield just changed that. Apps, a new product inside Supercomputer, lets you describe what you want and get a working generative application back.

entry.title: AI Fashion Photo Generator: On-Brand, On-Model Shots with Soul 2.0
entry.summary: Fashion photography has its own demands. Most AI tools miss them entirely. Soul 2.0 is Higgsfield's own image model built to fix that, with 20+ style presets, Soul HEX color control, and AI Stylist for outfit variations.

entry.title: Best AI Ad Generators in 2026: 6 Platforms for Video Ads Without a Production Team
entry.summary: The biggest reason small teams don't run video ads isn't budget. It's production. Six platforms that collapse the full workflow into one in 2026.

entry.title: How to Make Realistic AI Talking & LipSync Videos in 2026 (Avatars, Voice & Consistency)
entry.summary: Lip sync accuracy is solved. The fake look comes from frozen faces, flat eyes, and voice-face mismatch. Here's how to fix all five, before you hit generate.

entry.title: 10 Best RunwayML Alternatives in 2026: Cheaper, Tested & Compared
entry.summary: Runway works well for a lot of teams. But the search for alternatives is growing. Ten platforms worth knowing in 2026, what each one does best, and where each one falls short.

entry.title: Higgsfield AI vs Runway 2026: Plans and Pricing Compared
entry.summary: Both platforms carry the same flagship models. The difference is what each builds on top. A neutral plan-by-plan comparison of Higgsfield AI and Runway with credit math for high-volume generators.

entry.title: How to Build an AI-Powered TikTok Content Pipeline in 2026 (Step by Step)
entry.summary: To make a consistent, high-volume TikTok content pipeline with AI, you need the right tools for each stage. This step-by-step guide covers the full workflow and compares Higgsfield with InVideo to help you pick the right platform.

entry.title: How to Make YouTube Shorts with AI in 2026 (Using Higgsfield Shorts Studio)
entry.summary: Most people think making a YouTube Short means filming, editing, and figuring out the vertical format. With Shorts Studio, you upload your footage, pick a preset from 40+, and get a finished Short back.

entry.title: Seedance 2.0 AI Video: Technical Preview and User Discussion
entry.summary: Seedance 2.0 is the world's best AI video model, and it attracted a lot of attention with increasing emphasis on motion coherence, camera logic, and sequence-level stability. This article explores open signals and expectations around Seedance 2.0 based on publicly available commentary rather than hands-on testing.

entry.title: Kling 3.0 on Higgsfield: A Guide to the Next Era of AI Video Generation
entry.summary: Kling 3.0 on Higgsfield enables structured, scene-based AI video generation with precise control over pacing, motion, and subject consistency. It combines generation and editing into a single workflow, allowing creators to shape video through iteration instead of restarting from scratch.

entry.title: A Guide to Creating AI Motion Design with Higgsfield Vibe Motion
entry.summary: Higgsfield extends AI video generation with structured motion creation that’s designed for clarity & consistency. Motion graphics, presentations, and branded visuals become easier to shape, refine, and reuse through conversation rather than complex editing.

entry.title: What's New in GenAI: AI Motion Design Meets CodeGen Video Generation
entry.summary: Motion graphics are shifting from manual labor to "programming motion," replacing timelines with intelligent, scalable logic. This evolution allows creators to define intent once and generate endless on-brand variations instantly, turning creative direction into latest automated technical execution.

entry.title: AI Skin Enhancer: How AI Retouching Works in Editing?
entry.summary: AI Skin Enhancers technology provides photographers and creators with consistent, professional-grade, and realistic portrait results far superior to traditional blur filters.

entry.title: How AI Skin Enhancer Retouches Low-Quality Photos & Images
entry.summary: AI skin enhancers can now restore low-quality photos with realistic texture, clean skin, and rebuilt facial detail using advanced semantic reconstruction. This guide explains how next-gen AI retouching works and why it’s transforming portrait editing in 2025.

entry.title: FLUX.2: A Technical Preview
entry.summary: This article provides a technical preview of FLUX.2 , analyzing its shift toward structural control through JSON prompting and HEX color definition. The model is expected to deliver enhanced reliability in counting, world knowledge, and multi-reference consistency for professional workflows.

entry.summary: Nano Banana 2 is already expected to represent a structural leap over its predecessor. This comparison explores the key possible improvements that will position the model as a highly accurate and dependable tool for professional workflows.
